title: polygala vulgaris subsp. vulgaris
intro: Polygala vulgaris subsp. vulgaris, also known as the common polygala, is a flowering plant species within the milkwort family (Polygalaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of common polygala include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. Common polygala can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or capsule, and has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments, including respiratory issues and digestive problems.
